## Checklist

- [ ] No `.env` files or API keys committed
- [ ] New interfaces added to `src/types.ts` (not component-local unless trivial)
- [ ] AI tools wrapped in `<ToolErrorBoundary>`
- [ ] No inline styles for themeable values (use CSS vars)
